arts.ttl: Ruben Amorim spot on with prediction made after watching Man Utd stars just once
arts.sum: Ruben Amorim began his Manchester United tenure with a draw at Ipswich and the Portuguese manager quickly made it known that his job at Old Trafford was no quick fix

arts.ttl: Jamie Vardy, Luke Shaw & Co - The Premier League's current longest serving players at one club
arts.sum: There was a time where one club men or players who spent the majority of their careers at one club were fairly common in the Premier League. The likes of John Terry at...

arts.ttl: Papers: Man Utd appoint new full-time head of recruitment
arts.sum: The top stories and transfer rumours from Wednesday's newspapers...

arts.ttl: Ruben Amorim stance on Mason Mount made clear as Fabrizio Romano opens up on Inter rumours
arts.sum: Fabrizio Romano has dismissed the claims that Manchester United will let Mason Mount leave and the midfielder is liked by Inter. There were reports – via InterLive – that the former Chelsea man was liked by the Serie A club, however, transfer expert Romano has denied this – stating that Inter are pursuing “a completely […] The post Ruben Amorim stance on Mason Mount made clear as Fabrizio Romano opens up on Inter rumours appeared first on CaughtOffside.

arts.ttl: 'Hard choices are necessary' - Man Utd to cut up to 200 more jobs
arts.sum: After 250 members of staff were made redundant last year, Manchester United announce up to 200 more redundancies to "return the club to profitability".

arts.ttl: Amorim: Constant criticism compounding Utd slide
arts.sum: Ruben Amorim said on Tuesday that his Manchester United players are taking criticism "personally" and believes it's hampering their ability to perform.

arts.ttl: Erik ten Hag aims subtle dig at Man Utd players in first interview since brutal axe
arts.sum: Erik ten Hag was brutally sacked by Manchester United in October after an awful start to the season and was replaced by Ruben Amorim but has since spoken out on his time at Old Trafford

arts.ttl: Ruben Amorim blames Man United's 'lack of threat' for Rasmus Hojlund's goalscoring woes - as he defends under-fire striker amid 16-game drought
arts.sum: Ruben Amorim feels Manchester United 's inability to create chances is the main reason behind Rasmus Hojlund's struggles in front of goal this season.

arts.ttl: Man United legend Cristiano Ronaldo shows true colours with gesture to former Liverpool star
arts.sum: Cristiano Ronaldo scored once again for Al-Nassr as they beat Al-Wedha in the Saudi Pro League on Tuesday

arts.ttl: Man Utd without EIGHT stars for Ipswich Town clash as Ruben Amorim faces crisis
arts.sum: Manchester United's fitness problems are piling up after losing both Amad Diallo and Lisandro Martinez to season-ending injuries, with Ruben Amorim facing a crisis for the Ipswich Town clash
